title: Fix static function not found from parameterized extends class

features.name: parameterized class with static function
features.description: Code should include a class with a type parameter that contains a static function

features.name: class extending parameterized class with self-type parameter
features.description: Code should include a class that extends a parameterized class, passing the child class's own type as the type parameter

features.name: static function call via scope resolution on parameterized extended class
features.description: Code should include a static function call using the :: operator on a class that extends a parameterized class with self-type parameter
